meaning: n.大学二年级生,有二年经验的人
examples: Their daughter is a sophomore at Yale.
Meanwhile, Olivia Rubin, a sophomore at Emory, says she hardly even considers take-homes true exams.
During his sophomore year, he sold his first science-fiction story to a Scottish magazine named Nebula.
But in his sophomore year, 1974, he made a stunning comeback with a return of 120%.
But the idea that got them both excited popped up in a sophomore marketing class.
